items.title: hololive’s Sakura Miko announces collab with popular sushi chain Sushiro
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: A new collaboration has been announced between the popular conveyor belt sushi chain Sushiro and the Hololive VTuber, Sakura Miko.

items.title: “hololive” Artist rurudo’s “FALLEN” Pop-Up Shop Arrives in Osaka and Nagoya
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Following a massively popular run in Tokyo this past August that recorded over 20,000 visitors, the "FALLEN" pop-up shop for acclaimed illustrator rurudo is now touring Japan.

items.title: 16 hololive VTubers to take over Twitch for “holoday” collab event this November
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: COVER Corporation has announced "holoday," its first-ever official online collaboration event with the global live-streaming service, Twitch.
